siteTitle: Ecommerce Data Analytics: Data-backed guides on how to read ecommerce data
siteDescription: Your website is your biggest money-maker, but it's important to understand all metrics for your Ecommerce business. This website teaches you how to grow your business by understanding your key metrics.

articles.title: How to Track Ecommerce Conversion Funnel Drop-Off Points
articles.metaDescription: Learn how to track conversion funnel dropoff points using event tracking and cohort analysis. Discover specific metric thresholds that signal purchase flow problems.

articles.title: Why Your Bounce Rate Is Misleading for Ecommerce Sites
articles.metaDescription: Standard ecommerce bounce rate metrics fail for modern SPAs and AJAX stores. Learn which engagement metrics actually predict purchase behavior and revenue.

articles.title: How to Calculate True Customer Acquisition Source in GA4
articles.metaDescription: Learn to track customer acquisition sources accurately in GA4 using multi-touch attribution models that capture dark social and cross-device journeys.

articles.title: What Site Speed Metrics Actually Impact Ecommerce Revenue
articles.metaDescription: Data analysis of 50+ stores reveals which site speed metrics correlate with conversion rates. Learn the specific Core Web Vitals thresholds that affect revenue.

articles.title: How to Segment Product Page Performance by Traffic Source
articles.metaDescription: Learn to segment product page performance by traffic source in GA4. Build custom reports that reveal why pages convert from paid ads but fail from organic search.

articles.title: How to Set Up Enhanced Ecommerce Tracking That Works
articles.metaDescription: Learn the complete enhanced ecommerce tracking setup process for GA4. This implementation checklist covers dataLayer configuration, common firing issues, and QA testing.

articles.title: How to Calculate Email Marketing Contribution to Revenue
articles.metaDescription: Learn email marketing revenue attribution methods that isolate email's incremental impact. Calculate true contribution by accounting for customers who would have bought anyway.

articles.title: What Open Rates Mean After Apple Mail Privacy Changes
articles.metaDescription: Apple Mail Privacy Protection inflated email open rates overnight. Learn which engagement metrics like click patterns and conversion time now predict revenue better.

articles.title: How to Segment Email Performance by Customer Purchase Stage
articles.metaDescription: Learn to segment email performance by customer purchase stage. This framework separates first-time buyers, repeat customers, and lapsed segments for better ROI.

articles.title: How to Identify Your Most Profitable Email Send Time
articles.metaDescription: Learn to optimize email send time using revenue per email, not just opens. Statistical methodology for testing across time zones and customer segments.

articles.title: Why Your Email Click Rate Doesn't Predict Revenue
articles.metaDescription: High email click rates often fail to generate revenue. Learn why click quality, landing page match, and offer positioning determine actual purchase behavior.

articles.title: How to Measure Abandoned Cart Email Incremental Lift
articles.metaDescription: Learn to measure abandoned cart email effectiveness with A/B testing that reveals true incremental lift versus organic recovery. Data-driven methodology inside.

articles.title: How to Calculate True ROAS Including Refunds and Returns
articles.metaDescription: Learn to calculate true ROAS refunds by adjusting for returns, chargebacks, and cancellations. Discover which ad campaigns actually drive profitable customers.

articles.title: How to Audit Facebook Ads Reporting Discrepancies
articles.metaDescription: Learn a systematic process to reconcile Facebook ads reporting discrepancies with Shopify orders. Fix attribution windows and duplicate tracking issues.

articles.title: Why Your Google Ads Conversion Rate Varies by Time of Day
articles.metaDescription: Google Ads dayparting analysis reveals hourly conversion rate and AOV patterns. Learn to adjust bids based on profitability windows, not just click volume.

articles.title: How to Track New Customer Acquisition Cost by Channel
articles.metaDescription: Learn how to calculate new customer acquisition cost by channel to find which paid platforms grow your customer base versus retarget existing buyers.

articles.title: How to Measure Incrementality of Your Retargeting Spend
articles.metaDescription: Learn retargeting incrementality testing with holdout groups to find what percentage of conversions would happen without ads. Stop paying for inevitable purchases.

articles.title: What Your Ad Platform CPA Hides About Profitability
articles.metaDescription: Ad platform CPA profitability metrics hide AOV variance, shipping costs, and COGS differences. Learn the contribution margin framework that reveals true profit.

articles.title: How to Calculate SMS Marketing ROI Beyond Click Revenue
articles.metaDescription: Learn to calculate SMS marketing ROI using a full-funnel model that accounts for list growth costs, carrier fees, compliance overhead, and lifetime value impact.

articles.title: What Subscriber Growth Rate Signals SMS List Health
articles.metaDescription: Learn which SMS subscriber growth rate benchmarks indicate a healthy list versus one burning out. Includes opt-in thresholds, velocity targets, and opt-out warning signs.

articles.title: How to Measure SMS Cannibalization of Email Revenue
articles.metaDescription: Learn testing methodology to measure SMS email channel cannibalization. Determine if SMS steals email conversions or generates incremental revenue with proper holdout tests.

articles.title: How to Track SMS Contribution by Customer Segment
articles.metaDescription: Learn to track SMS customer segments using cohort analysis. Compare VIP versus one-time buyer performance to identify which tiers justify higher SMS costs.

articles.title: Why Your SMS Conversion Rate Drops After the First Month
articles.metaDescription: SMS conversion rate decline hits most ecommerce brands hard after 30 days. Learn the message fatigue patterns and frequency optimization tactics that prevent subscriber burnout.

articles.title: How to Compare SMS Providers Using Revenue Metrics
articles.metaDescription: Learn how to compare SMS marketing providers like Attentive, Postscript, and Klaviyo using revenue metrics, deliverability testing, and incremental lift measurement.

articles.title: How to Calculate Customer LTV for Product-Based Businesses
articles.metaDescription: Learn to calculate customer LTV for ecommerce with SKU-level margins, channel retention curves, and purchase frequency. Step-by-step formulas included.

articles.title: Why Your Contribution Margin Per Order Matters More Than AOV
articles.metaDescription: Contribution margin per order reveals true profitability that AOV hides. Learn why chasing higher order values can destroy margins and what to optimize instead.

articles.title: How to Build a Cohort-Based LTV Projection Model
articles.metaDescription: Learn to build a cohort LTV projection model in spreadsheets. Calculate CAC payback periods and allocate channel budgets with accurate customer value forecasts.

articles.title: What CAC Payback Period Is Acceptable for Your Store
articles.metaDescription: Your CAC payback period target depends on cash flow, growth stage, and funding. Learn the framework to set realistic payback windows for your ecommerce store.

articles.title: How to Calculate Product-Level Profitability Accurately
articles.metaDescription: Learn to calculate product level profitability using full-cost accounting. Allocate shipping, returns, and channel fees to each SKU to find your real winners.

articles.title: How to Track Net Revenue Retention for Ecommerce
articles.metaDescription: Learn how to adapt SaaS net revenue retention metrics for ecommerce. Track whether existing customers spend more over time and measure repeat purchase health.
